package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for response_dto_contains_gorm_tags: Response payload structs that carry persistence-only `gorm` tags.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule144NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule144NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule144NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario144Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule144NegativeService, input Rule144NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
